title: 菊花賞の後に・ウォークライ

text_block_list.text:
The trial of Biwa Hayahide's new equation
focused on winning—rather than simply not
losing—proves to be a success, and she claims
victory at the Kikuka Sho.

Biwa Hayahide is too happy to hide her joy, and
when Narita Taishin comes to challenge her to a
rematch, she is shocked by her friend's
unexpected exuberance.

They promise to run together again at the spring
Tenno Sho, and Biwa Hayahide pronounces her
certain victory with a huge smile.
